strengths: Quantified impact on efficiency and revenue
weaknesses: No Power Automate or Jira experience listed
Only ~3 years total relevant experience (varied roles)
improvement_bullets: Analyzed clinical and operational datasets, including Revenue Cycle Management (RCM) metrics, to identify bottlenecks and improve billing accuracy, mirroring the rigor required in healthcare analytics.
Streamlined project management and ticket resolution by integrating workflows within Jira, ensuring cross-functional transparency and tracking for all data-driven initiatives.
Designed automated workflows using Power Automate to sync operational data across platforms, reducing manual data entry and optimizing resource allocation for business stakeholders.
Leveraged AI-driven tools, including LLMs for code generation and pattern recognition, to expedite data cleaning, complex query writing, and anomaly detection.
Maintained high standards of data integrity in high-stakes environments, applying consistent validation protocols to ensure the accuracy of financial and operational reporting.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Analyst opportunity with New York Bariatric Group. I am interested in this opportunity because of the organization’s reputation for providing exemplary patient care and your commitment to using innovative systems to improve health outcomes. What interests me about working for New York Bariatric Group is its data-centric approach to patient wellness and operational efficiency, which inspires me because I am passionate about translating complex data into actionable insights that directly impact quality of care. I believe my advanced SQL and Python proficiency and my deep experience in automating data pipelines would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my career, I have approached problems by prioritizing data accuracy and cross-functional transparency. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I led an initiative to replace manual reporting with automated Power BI and Looker workflows. As a result, I eliminated repetitive data entry, saved 8 hours of administrative time per week, and provided leadership with a 'single source of truth' that reduced reporting discrepancies. Ultimately, I know that the Data Analyst role at New York Bariatric Group would allow me to bring my technical expertise to your mission of enhancing patient outcomes through data-driven decisions. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst and Operations Lead enabled me to develop my skills in stakeholder collaboration and KPI management. I consistently bridged the gap between raw data and growth strategy by presenting findings in meetings to ensure alignment between operations and technical output. This experience translates directly to the collaborative nature of your clinical and financial teams. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and data modeling in working on your complex reporting and RCM systems at New York Bariatric Group. I know that my technical versatility and analytical mindset align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
